message: 🌱 Add kgateway: Expose rate limit counters in response headers mission (#677)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kgateway-2785-expose-rate-limit-counters-in-response-headers",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kgateway: Expose rate limit counters in response headers",
+    "description": "Expose rate limit counters in response headers. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kgateway deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kgateway version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway\nhelm list -n kgateway 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kgateway installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kgateway configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kgateway configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway\nkubectl get configmap -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kgateway\n```\nFeature request to expose more rate limiting information in the response headers for clients.\n\nCurrently only a header for specifying you have been rate limited is returned.\n\nIt would be nice to have more default information provided."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Expose rate limit counters in response headers",
+        "description": "This new feature exposes API options to enable X-RateLimit headers in Envoy/rate-limiter config. The related rate-limiter PR for implementing the return of the headers is [here](https://github.com/solo-io/rate-limiter/pull/133)\n```yaml\nX-RateLimit-Limit-Second: 5\nX-RateLimit-Remaining-Second: 4\nX-RateLimit-Limit-Minute: 10\nX-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute: 9\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kgateway -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kgateway\nkubectl get events -n kgateway --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Expose rate limit counters in response headers\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This new feature exposes API options to enable X-RateLimit headers in Envoy/rate-limiter config. The related rate-limiter PR for implementing the return of the headers is [here](https://github.com/solo-io/rate-limiter/pull/133)",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "X-RateLimit-Limit-Second: 5\nX-RateLimit-Remaining-Second: 4\nX-RateLimit-Limit-Minute: 10\nX-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute: 9",
+        "for key in $(redis-cli -p 6379 keys \\*);\n  do echo \"Key : '$key'\"\n     redis-cli -p 6379 GET $key;\ndone"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kgateway",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kgateway"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kgateway-dev/kgateway/issues/2785",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kgateway-dev/kgateway",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kgateway-dev/kgateway/pull/6717"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kgateway installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {

+  }
+}
